---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .gy-hero {
    position: relative !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    min-height: 610px !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    display: flex !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    isolation: isolate;
    background: #082f24;
  }

  .gy-slideshow {
    position: absolute !important;
    inset: 0 !important;
    z-index: 0 !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
  }

  .gy-slide {
    position: absolute !important;
    inset: 0 !important;
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
    max-width: none !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    object-fit: cover !important;
    object-position: center center !important;
    opacity: 0 !important;
    transform: scale(1.02);
    transition: opacity 1.5s ease-in-out !important;
    animation: gySlowZoom 12s ease-out infinite alternate;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .gy-slide.is-active {
    opacity: 1 !important;
  }

  @keyframes gySlowZoom {
    from {
      transform: scale(1.02);
    }

    to {
      transform: scale(1.08);
    }
  }

  .gy-overlay {
    position: absolute !important;
    inset: 0 !important;
    z-index: 1 !important;
    background:
      linear-gradient(
        90deg,
        rgba(3, 29, 22, 0.93) 0%,
        rgba(3, 29, 22, 0.79) 38%,
        rgba(3, 29, 22, 0.36) 68%,
        rgba(3, 29, 22, 0.12) 100%
      );
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .gy-content {
    position: relative !important;
    z-index: 2 !important;
    width: min(760px, 90%) !important;
    margin-left: max(5vw, 45px) !important;
    padding: 75px 0 !important;
    color: white !important;
  }

  .gy-title {
    max-width: 760px !important;
    margin: 0 0 24px !important;
    color: #ffffff !important;
    font-family: Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif !important;
    font-size: clamp(40px, 3.8vw, 58px) !important;
    font-weight: 600 !important;
    line-height: 1.08 !important;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.38);
  }

  .gy-description {
    max-width: 650px !important;
    margin: 0 0 32px !important;
    color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.96) !important;
    font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif !important;
    font-size: 20px !important;
    line-height: 1.6 !important;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.32);
  }

  .gy-buttons {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-wrap: wrap !important;
    gap: 14px !important;
  }

  .gy-button {
    display: inline-flex !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    justify-content: center !important;
    min-height: 54px !important;
    padding: 14px 24px !important;
    border-radius: 5px !important;
    font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif !important;
    font-size: 14px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.035em !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    transition: transform 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease !important;
  }

  .gy-button-primary {
    color: #ffffff !important;
    background: #256844 !important;
    border: 1px solid #256844 !important;
  }

  .gy-button-primary:hover {
    color: #ffffff !important;
    background: #317b53 !important;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  .gy-button-secondary {
    color: #ffffff !important;
    background: rgba(4, 28, 21, 0.30) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.82) !important;
  }

  .gy-button-secondary:hover {
    color: #ffffff !important;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) !important;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  .gy-welcome {
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 65px 35px;
  }

  .gy-welcome h2 {
    color: #123c2d;
    font-family: Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
    font-size: 38px;
  }

  @media (max-width: 767px) {
    .gy-hero {
      min-height: 570px !important;
      align-items: flex-end !important;
    }

    .gy-slide {
      animation: none;
    }

    .gy-overlay {
      background: rgba(3, 29, 22, 0.70);
    }

    .gy-content {
      width: 100% !important;
      margin: 0 !important;
      padding: 52px 24px 46px !important;
      box-sizing: border-box !important;
    }

    .gy-title {
      width: 100% !important;
      max-width: 100% !important;
      font-size: clamp(36px, 10vw, 46px) !important;
      line-height: 1.06 !important;
    }

    .gy-description {
      width: 100% !important;
      max-width: 100% !important;
      font-size: 16px !important;
      line-height: 1.55 !important;
    }

    .gy-buttons {
      flex-direction: column !important;
      width: 100% !important;
    }

    .gy-button {
      width: 100% !important;
      box-sizing: border-box !important;
    }
  }

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .gy-slide {
      animation: none !important;
      transition: opacity 0.4s ease !important;
    }
  }
</style>

<section class="gy-hero">

  <div class="gy-slideshow" aria-hidden="true">

    <img src="images/hero-18-phoenix-skyline.jpg" class="gy-slide is-active" alt="" fetchpriority="high">
    <img src="images/hero-01-san-diego-community-garden.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-02-lima-urban-garden.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-10-peru-sand-dunes.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-11-florida-orchard.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-04-florida-home-food-forest.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-08-backyard-food-forest.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-13-market-garden.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-07-lima-community-garden.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-16-garden-tour.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-12-mango-grower.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-17-home-garden-harvest.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-09-australia-garden-tour.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-05-california-orchard.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-03-food-forest-tour.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-15-arizona-food-forest.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">
    <img src="images/hero-14-phoenix-koi-pond.jpg" class="gy-slide" alt="">

  </div>

  <div class="gy-overlay"></div>

  <div class="gy-content">

    <h1 class="gy-title">
      What does abundance look like around the world?
    </h1>

    <p class="gy-description">
      Join us as we explore food forests, edible landscapes, and the
      inspiring people creating abundance through plants and food in
      different places.
    </p>

    <div class="gy-buttons">

      <a class="gy-button gy-button-primary" href="videos.qmd">
        Explore the Tours
      </a>

      <a class="gy-button gy-button-secondary"
         href="https://www.youtube.com/@thegreenyardaz"
         target="_blank"
         rel="noopener">
        ▶ Watch on YouTube
      </a>

    </div>

  </div>

</section>

<section class="gy-welcome">

  <h2>Welcome to The Green Yard</h2>

  <p>More coming soon...</p>

</section>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const slides = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(".gy-slide"));

  if (slides.length < 2) {
    return;
  }

  let current = 0;

  window.setInterval(function () {
    slides[current].classList.remove("is-active");

    current = (current + 1) % slides.length;

    slides[current].classList.add("is-active");
  }, 6500);
});
</script>
```
